source_jobs.title: Automation QE Lead: Quality Architecture & Agentic Testing
source_jobs.description:
About airSlate
airSlate is a global SaaS technology company that develops no-code workflow automation, electronic signature, and document management solutions. Our award-winning products - SignNow, pdfFiller, DocHub, altaFlow, Instapage, and US Legal Forms - serve over hundreds of millions of  users and more than one million customers worldwide, helping organizations of every size digitize processes, improve efficiency, and transform how they work.
 
We’re in an exciting phase of growth and transformation, with teammates in more than 20 countries across three continents and main hubs in the United States, Poland, Romania, Ukraine and Philippines. 
At airSlate, we’re building value for customers and a culture where growth and innovation go hand in hand. We’re looking for people eager to shape products, scale a company, and thrive in a fast-moving environment.


About your team: 
We are a passionate and ambitious team of 140+ people on a mission to succeed with our award-winning signature solution –  SignNow.
SignNow empowers over 28 million people at companies across the world to move fast with everything they need to send and eSign their documents. Increase productivity with document workflows, impress customers, and save money while maximizing ROI with SignNow.
 
We're looking for an engineer-first quality leader. Someone who came up through AQE or principal engineering, thinks in systems, and is genuinely excited about what agentic AI means for quality.
You'll lead a team of 6-10 Automation Quality Engineers, own our existing automation estate, and drive a deliberate transition toward agentic quality engineering. Deterministic pipelines today, autonomous test agents tomorrow.

source_jobs.title: Chief People Officer
source_jobs.description:
About airSlate
 
airSlate is a global SaaS technology company that serves tens of millions of users worldwide. Our journey began with a handful of Boston employees in 2008 and grew into a leading tech company with approximately 700 team members across six offices worldwide. Our portfolio of award-winning products, SignNow, pdfFiller, DocHub, altaFlow, Instapage, and US Legal Forms, empowers our customers to digitally transform how they run their businesses.
 
As we continue to scale, we are looking for a Chief People Officer who is comfortable operating in high-growth environments where priorities evolve, and systems mature over time. This is not a steady-state role. It is an engaged leadership position for someone who has supported organizations through significant changes and understands how to grow people, culture, and leadership capabilities. You will work closely with the CEO/founder and the executive team as a trusted partner, coach, and contributor to the organization's long-term development. We are looking for a leader with experience supporting organizations through milestones such as financings, M&A, and IPOs.

At airSlate, we’re building value for customers and a culture where growth and innovation go hand in hand. We’re looking for people eager to shape products, scale a company, and thrive in a fast-moving environment.


About the Marketing Engine team:
The marketing team handles comprehensive 360º communication and comprises over 150 people. We manage all aspects in-house and operate a robust automation engine. Our combined monthly traffic across all brands exceeds 31 million. As a marketing team member, you'll play a crucial role in the upcoming phase of our brand's growth as we expand and introduce new products to the market.

source_jobs.title: Email Marketing Specialist
source_jobs.description:
About airSlate
airSlate is a global SaaS technology company that develops no-code workflow automation, electronic signature, and document management solutions. Our award-winning products - SignNow, pdfFiller, DocHub, altaFlow, Instapage, and US Legal Forms - serve over hundreds of millions of users and more than one million customers worldwide, helping organizations of every size digitize processes, improve efficiency, and transform how they work. 
 
We’re in an exciting phase of growth and transformation, with teammates in more than 20 countries across three continents and main hubs in the United States, Poland, Romania, Ukraine and Philippines. 
At airSlate, we’re building value for customers and a culture where growth and innovation go hand in hand. We’re looking for people eager to shape products, scale a company, and thrive in a fast-moving environment.


We are currently looking for two Email Marketing Specialists to join our team and contribute to the next chapter of airSlate’s growth.
The Email Marketing team supports communication across our subscription-based SaaS products, including lifecycle and promotional messaging that helps users discover value, stay engaged, and move through key customer journey stages.
Each Email Marketing Specialist will focus on one of our core products — pdfFiller or SignNow — owning email initiatives tailored to that product’s specific funnels, stakeholders, priorities, and user journeys.
The team’s work goes far beyond launching campaigns. It is focused on solving business challenges through email and related channels, testing new ideas, reacting to changing priorities, and continuously improving lifecycle communication. Success in this role requires the ability to navigate ambiguity, think independently, and turn hypotheses into effective campaigns.
Operating as an independent unit within the marketing team, this group partners closely with product and brand stakeholders and acts as a practical expert function for lifecycle communication, experimentation, and user engagement.

source_jobs.title: PPC/Mobile UA Specialist
source_jobs.description:
About airSlate
airSlate is a global SaaS technology company that develops no-code workflow automation, electronic signature, and document management solutions. Our award-winning products - SignNow, pdfFiller, DocHub, altaFlow, Instapage, and US Legal Forms - serve over hundreds of millions of users and more than one million customers worldwide, helping organizations of every size digitize processes, improve efficiency, and transform how they work. 
 
We’re in an exciting phase of growth and transformation, with teammates in more than 20 countries across three continents and main hubs in the United States, Poland, Romania, Ukraine and Philippines. 
At airSlate, we’re building value for customers and a culture where growth and innovation go hand in hand. We’re looking for people eager to shape products, scale a company, and thrive in a fast-moving environment.


MarketingDepartment covers 360º communication and consists of 100+ people. We do everything in-house, owe and operate the massive automation engine. Monthly traffic to all of our brands is 31M+. 
 
About the team: 
The PPC team is responsible for driving scalable user acquisition and growth across our subscription SaaS products. The team works with paid acquisition channels to attract high-intent audiences, optimize funnel performance, and support business goals through measurable, data-backed decisions. 
 
And now, we are looking for a PPC Specialist who is prepared to contribute to the next chapter of our company's growth.
 
This role will focus primarily on mobile paid acquisition, with a strong emphasis on platforms such as Apple Search Ads, while also remaining close to key web performance channels like Google Ads and Microsoft Ads.  Working closely with stakeholders across marketing and product, you will help shaping acquisition strategy, identifying optimization opportunities, and ensuring paid traffic initiatives are aligned with broader company priorities. You will look beyond surface-level campaign metrics and focuse on business outcomes, efficiency, and sustainable growth of the products.

source_jobs.title: Senior Analytics Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About airSlate
airSlate is a global SaaS technology company that develops no-code workflow automation, electronic signature, and document management solutions. Our award-winning products - SignNow, pdfFiller, DocHub, altaFlow, Instapage, and US Legal Forms - serve over hundreds of millions of users and more than one million customers worldwide, helping organizations of every size digitize processes, improve efficiency, and transform how they work. 
 
We’re in an exciting phase of growth and transformation, with teammates in more than 20 countries across three continents and main hubs in the United States, Poland, Romania, Ukraine and Philippines. 
At airSlate, we’re building value for customers and a culture where growth and innovation go hand in hand. We’re looking for people eager to shape products, scale a company, and thrive in a fast-moving environment.


About the team
The Marketing Data team builds the data foundation for marketing measurement and decision-making across products as part of a decentralized data ownership model. We own core marketing analytics datasets and ensure they are reliable, well documented, and usable for both reporting and advanced analysis.
We combine acquisition and product analytics data into trusted, decision-ready models and dashboards. The team is responsible for improving tracking quality, standardizing key definitions, and maintaining scalable datasets across analytics and advertising platforms.
This work helps make performance transparent and comparable across campaigns and products, enabling faster insights and more confident decision-making. You will partner with analysts, marketers, and engineers to improve data quality, evolve core metrics, and develop durable data marts that support self-serve reporting and deeper analytical use cases.

source_jobs.title: Senior Director of Marketing
source_jobs.description:
About airSlate
airSlate is a global SaaS technology company that develops no-code workflow automation, electronic signature, and document management solutions. Our award-winning products - SignNow, pdfFiller, DocHub, altaFlow, Instapage, and US Legal Forms - serve over hundreds of millions of users and more than one million customers worldwide, helping organizations of every size digitize processes, improve efficiency, and transform how they work. 
 
We’re in an exciting phase of growth and transformation, with teammates in more than 20 countries across three continents and main hubs in the United States, Poland, Romania, Ukraine and Philippines. 
At airSlate, we’re building value for customers and a culture where growth and innovation go hand in hand. We’re looking for people eager to shape products, scale a company, and thrive in a fast-moving environment.


About pdfFiller team:
We are a passionate and ambitious team of 120+ people on a mission to succeed with our online PDF creator and editor – pdfFiller.
pdfFiller helps over 1 million SMB customers complete document-based use cases quickly and easily so they can focus on running their business. It enables SMBs to go completely paperless with seamless document editing and management from any device. pdfFiller saves customers time by always having just the template or feature you need – from invoice templates to lease agreements and online fax to notarization – always tailored specifically for small businesses. It also securely and efficiently solves financial, legal and HR-related workflows with capabilities to manage e-signature workflows and form response collection one at a time or in bulk.
 
About the Role:
The VP, Marketing will lead growth of a significant global brand that currently has 1M+ paying customers, 20M+ unique visitors per month and a $XXM advertising budget. The new leader will develop branding and positioning that conveys the value of the pdfFiller platform, both now and in the future, to its SMB customer base. They will partner closely with product, growth, support and engineering to continue scaling an excellent product-led growth motion and customer experience. They will also leverage pdfFiller’s proprietary marketing engine and have dotted line management of pdfFiller’s 50+ person centralized marketing team.

source_jobs.title: Senior HR Operations Specialist
source_jobs.description:
About airSlate
airSlate is a global SaaS technology company that develops no-code workflow automation, electronic signature, and document management solutions. Our award-winning products - SignNow, pdfFiller, DocHub, altaFlow, Instapage, and US Legal Forms - serve over hundreds of millions of  users and more than one million customers worldwide, helping organizations of every size digitize processes, improve efficiency, and transform how they work.
 
We’re in an exciting phase of growth and transformation, with teammates in more than 20 countries across three continents and main hubs in the United States, Poland, Romania, Ukraine and Philippines. 
At airSlate, we’re building value for customers and a culture where growth and innovation go hand in hand. We’re looking for people eager to shape products, scale a company, and thrive in a fast-moving environment.


About the Role:

We are looking for an experienced HR Operations Specialist to own and scale our people operations infrastructure in Ukraine.

This role sits at the centre of HR, Legal, Payroll, and Compliance, ensuring our Ukraine workforce remains fully compliant, operationally efficient, and well supported in a fast-changing regulatory environment.

You will play a critical role in managing Diia City compliance, employment lifecycle operations, contractor management, and wartime employment obligations, while helping build scalable HR processes that support the continued growth of the business.

This is a highly cross-functional role requiring strong attention to detail, sound judgement, and the ability to operate confidently in a complex and evolving environment.

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
About airSlate
airSlate is a global SaaS technology company that develops no-code workflow automation, electronic signature, and document management solutions. Our award-winning products - SignNow, pdfFiller, DocHub, altaFlow, Instapage, and US Legal Forms - serve over hundreds of millions of users and more than one million customers worldwide, helping organizations of every size digitize processes, improve efficiency, and transform how they work. 
 
We’re in an exciting phase of growth and transformation, with teammates in more than 20 countries across three continents and main hubs in the United States, Poland, Romania, Ukraine and Philippines. 
At airSlate, we’re building value for customers and a culture where growth and innovation go hand in hand. We’re looking for people eager to shape products, scale a company, and thrive in a fast-moving environment.


About SignNow team
We are a passionate and ambitious team of 100+ people on a mission to succeed with our award-winning signature solution, SignNow.
SignNow empowers over 28 million people at companies across the world to move fast with everything they need to send and eSign their documents. Increase productivity with document workflows, impress customers, and save money while maximizing ROI with SignNow.
 
About the role:

As a Senior Product Manager, Core Agreement Features, you will own and evolve the user-facing experiences at the heart of SignNow’s agreement execution journey. You will identify the biggest user pain points in core flows, simplify complex tasks through excellent UX, and use AI capabilities where they meaningfully improve clarity, confidence, and time-to-completion.
A key part of this role is helping users succeed in high-stakes moments where they may not fully understand what is required from a compliance perspective. You will design product experiences that guide users toward the right actions, reduce risk, and increase trust, without overwhelming them.
This role is highly outcome-driven. You will define hypotheses, run A/B tests, and drive measurable business impact. You will collaborate closely with engineering, design, analytics, support, sales, and marketing, and operate with high ownership and independence.

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer - Agentic AI
source_jobs.description:
About airSlate
airSlate is a global SaaS technology company that develops no-code workflow automation, electronic signature, and document management solutions. Our award-winning products - SignNow, pdfFiller, DocHub, altaFlow, Instapage, and US Legal Forms - serve over hundreds of millions of users and more than one million customers worldwide, helping organizations of every size digitize processes, improve efficiency, and transform how they work. 
 
We’re in an exciting phase of growth and transformation, with teammates in more than 20 countries across three continents and main hubs in the United States, Poland, Romania, Ukraine and Philippines. 
At airSlate, we’re building value for customers and a culture where growth and innovation go hand in hand. We’re looking for people eager to shape products, scale a company, and thrive in a fast-moving environment.


About SignNow team:
We are a passionate and ambitious team of 100+ people on a mission to succeed with our award-winning signature solution –  SignNow.
SignNow empowers over 28 million people at companies across the world to move fast with everything they need to send and eSign their documents. Increase productivity with document workflows, impress customers, and save money while maximizing ROI with SignNow.
And now we are looking for a Senior AI Engineer to focus on building AI capabilities from the ground up in a greenfield environment, helping shape the foundations of how intelligence is embedded into the product. You will design and implement production-grade agentic workflows, pipelines, and AI-powered product experiences, going beyond simple model usage to create reliable systems that can deliver real business value.
This role requires strong ownership in evaluating frameworks, orchestrating deterministic and non-deterministic flows, and turning emerging AI technologies into scalable product capabilities. Will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams and senior engineers across the organization to define architecture, drive technical initiatives, and help establish the engineering standards for AI systems in a production environment.

notes: High growth SaaS company with global presence and multiple products
